title: Xtra Light Ukrainian Sesame Pilaf
description: A sweet and pillowy Ukrainian dish featuring sesame seeds, baked in a comal to create a crispy en-croute crust, perfect for a light and satisfying meal.
instructions: Preheat the comal over medium heat.
In a large bowl, mix together the cooked brown rice, toasted sesame seeds, chopped onion, grated carrot, and diced apple.
In a small bowl, whisk together the olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the oil mixture over the rice mixture and stir until everything is well combined.
Add the water to the rice mixture and stir until the liquid is fully absorbed.
Transfer the rice mixture to the preheated comal and shape into a round pilaf.
Bake the pilaf in the comal for 20 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and crispy.
Remove the pilaf from the comal and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
